response: TEMPERATURE SHOULD BE MEASURED CAREFULLY TO ENSURE ACCURATE RESULTS. THE SYSTEM REQUIRES STRICT COMPLIANCE WITH ALL GUIDELINES. EVERY STEP MUST BE FOLLOWED TO AVOID ANY MISTAKES. THIS PROCESS INVOLVES SEVERAL STEPS THAT SHOULD NOT BE SKIPPED. THE SUCCESS OF THE TASK DEPENDS ON STRICT ADHERENCE TO THE RULES. PLEASE REVIEW THE INSTRUCTIONS BEFORE STARTING. ALL SENTENCES MUST BE IN CAPITAL LETTERS AND FOLLOW THE GUIDELINES. THE LETTER S MUST APPEAR AT LEAST THIRTEEN TIMES THROUGHOUT THE RESPONSE. EACH REQUIREMENT MUST BE MET WITHOUT EXCEPTION. THE WORD ROLL SHOULD BE PLACED AS THE SECOND WORD IN THE TWELFTH SENTENCE. THIS TASK DEMANDS ATTENTION TO DETAIL AND CAREFUL PLANNING. ROLL THE DICE TO DETERMINE THE NEXT ACTION. MAKE SURE TO COUNT THE S'S AND VERIFY THE REQUIREMENTS ARE SATISFIED. THE FINAL CHECK SHOULD CONFIRM EVERY CONDITION IS MET.
